name: I had health issues before chemical exposure at work - does that hurt my case?
description: No, claims cover aggravation of pre-existing issues[2].

mainEntity.name: I had health issues before chemical exposure at work - does that hurt my case?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, claims cover aggravation of pre-existing issues[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Pre-existing conditions don't bar claims if exposure aggravated them; comp covers worsening.** Prove work caused new/exacerbated harm[2]. **Key factors:** Medical differentiation via experts[2]. **Practical guidance:** Detailed records show progression post-exposure. Attorney argues aggravation. **Aggravation is compensable.**
